overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a sandstorm-swept urban street at night. The environment transitions from industrial warehouses to neon-lit commercial districts with prominent signage, ending at an underpass. Heavy atmospheric haze and orange-brown dust create a dystopian atmosphere mixed with vibrant neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with warehouse buildings and parked vehicles

events.description: sandstorm reduces visibility creating orange haze throughout the scene

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to industrial warehouse buildings

entered.detail: large industrial building with metal siding and loading docks
tall metal scaffolding structure with corrugated barriers
row of parked vehicles along the curb
tall street lamps illuminating the foggy atmosphere

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy industrial street during a sandstorm. The camera moves forward along a concrete sidewalk beside a large warehouse building on the left and metal scaffolding on the right. Parked cars line the street while sparse pedestrians walk ahead. Street lights cut through the orange haze, creating a dystopian industrial atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with neon signage and palm trees

events.description: transitioning from industrial warehouses to commercial buildings with neon signs
pink neon 'Pizza' sign becomes visible on the left building facade

agents.ego_description: walking through increasing crowds of pedestrians on the commercial sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in light-colored jacket walking in same direction ahead of ego

entered.detail: pink neon sign reading 'Pizza' on building facade
green neon sign with Japanese characters
large floating holographic advertisement visible in the distance through the haze

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from industrial to commercial as the camera passes neon signs including a green Japanese character sign and a pink 'Pizza' sign. The crowd density increases to moderate with pedestrians walking in the same direction. Palm trees line the right side of the street while a large holographic billboard becomes visible in the distance through the sandstorm haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial district with prominent purple signage

events.description: vibrant purple 'Jacked and Coke' neon sign illuminates the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing through the crowd past vibrant neon storefronts and advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with backpack and vest walking ahead in the crowd

entered.detail: bright purple neon sign reading 'Jacked and Coke' on building corner
storefront entrance bathed in purple neon light
orange and white concrete traffic barriers along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The environment becomes dominated by vibrant neon lighting as the camera passes the prominent purple 'Jacked and Coke' sign. The large holographic billboard moves closer from the distance to mid-range. Pedestrians continue walking in the same direction along the concrete sidewalk, which is now lined with concrete barriers on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to covered underpass with bright exit lighting

events.description: approaching the underpass structure with bright light visible at the far end

agents.ego_description: walking toward and entering the underpass with other pedestrians ahead

entered.detail: large concrete underpass structure with bright light at the exit
intense white light streaming from the far end of the underpass tunnel
smooth concrete walls of the underpass structure

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and enters a concrete underpass, transitioning from the open street to a semi-covered space. The bright exit light at the far end creates a stark contrast with the darker tunnel interior. The crowd continues moving forward into the underpass, leaving the neon-lit commercial district behind as the concrete walls enclose the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sandstorm-swept urban street that transforms from a bleak industrial zone into a vibrant neon commercial district before ending in a concrete underpass. It begins on a foggy industrial sidewalk beside a large warehouse and metal scaffolding, where street lights pierce through a thick orange haze. As the camera moves forward, the industrial surroundings give way to a commercial area filled with palm trees and glowing neon signs, including a green Japanese character sign and a pink pizza advertisement. The scene then shifts into a more densely lit environment dominated by a purple Jacked and Coke sign and a looming holographic billboard that grows larger as the camera advances. Finally, the open, neon-lit street narrows as the camera enters a dark concrete underpass, moving toward a bright exit light that contrasts with the enclosing tunnel walls.
